members.member:
encrypt or decrypt all data
@param data data to be encrypted/decrypted. Tag is not included
Encrypt/Decrypt one block data. @param data The length should be 16

Single-file ML-KEM implementation container.
All helpers intentionally live in this file to match the requested layout. The implementation is being built from the algorithm core upward: parameters, byte helpers, XOF, polynomial math, encoding, and protocol flow.
